## 🌐 ITITAN Hosting
[![ITITAN Hosting](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/3geETR/images/refs/heads/main/Other/ititan.png)](https://ititanhosting.com/game/minecraft)



# **Rideable Dolphins**

Rideable Dolphins lets you ride dolphins using a salmon on a stick! You can craft it with a fishing rod and a salmon.


## Easy Craft
![craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73c459432d84c9f65c0393c5a5c271a3c1ab5253.png)


## Relaxing Times
Find a stunning ocean view, play your favorite music in the background, and just ride around to relax and pass the time.

![3rd](https://media3.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExbXFpNjdyc21jbmpoa3Nra3NxZHlsNHY1MTdveW15Zm5rZXd2ZDA4ZCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/pVcx2D0YZm9Nbs20T0/giphy.gif)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/eAFzQNkJ5cA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


## This is just a datapack!
Yes, since it’s a datapack there are some limitations, but you can also download it as a mod. It works easily both on plugin-based servers and in singleplayer.


**This datapack uses the [Iris Raycast library](https://github.com/Aeldrion/Iris) for raycasting!
The library is included in the datapack, so you don’t need to download anything extra.**



**Your feedback is important to us. You can write on Discord. Discord name: tpcoffline**
